algorithm.fold_repair: Iteratively blend only neighborhoods whose two possible quad diagonals both have non-positive triangle-normal agreement toward the section's matched ellipse; never move measured cardinal extrema.

interpolation.method: Fritsch-Carlson PCHIP independently on X and Z point tracks

algorithm.representation: direct X-Z boundary point tracks at anatomical Y planes
algorithm.triangulation: choose per-quad diagonal with the higher adjacent-triangle normal dot product

coordinate_frame.name: HRA Visible Human Female common frame
